links.targetTitle: DocumentToolbar exposes className enabledControls and callback props
The DocumentToolbar className prop merges with defaults via twMerge

title: Pearl Icon Glow Pattern
content: The Powerhouse brand features a pearl icon glow effect as a visual signature element. A conic gradient is placed behind the pearl logo icon, creating a luminous halo. The glow is activated on hover using CSS transitions (not CSS animations) that rotate the gradient to 30 degrees. This approach ensures the effect is performant and declarative. The implementation uses CSS transitions rather than keyframe animations, keeping the interaction simple and predictable. This pattern is specific to the Powerhouse parent brand and is documented in the styleguide.html file. Reference: https://github.com/powerhouse-inc/design-systems/blob/main/powerhouse/styleguide.html.
description: Conic gradient glow behind the Powerhouse pearl logo icon, activated on hover with CSS transition rotating to 30deg.
